_description: Stock splitting configuration for fly_stocker_v2 pipeline_split module. Ref++ / Ref+ / Ref- are determined solely by whether keywords appear in the title or abstract of associated publications (no GPT / functional-validity dependency).

_column_notes.genotype: Stock genotype string - used for balancer and construct detection
_column_notes.all_stock_constructs: Semicolon-separated list of unique transgenic construct symbols from BDSC stockgenes.csv (non-FBgn components)
_column_notes.UAS: COMPUTED: Boolean - true if stock genotype contains 'UAS' (case-insensitive)
_column_notes.sgRNA: COMPUTED: Boolean - true if stock genotype contains 'sgRNA' (case-insensitive)
_column_notes.PMID: Semicolon-separated list of PMIDs, or '-' if none
_column_notes.Balancers: COMPUTED: Balancers detected in genotypes containing '/' (structural parsing with construct contents masked; longest-match-first), or '-'
_column_notes.multiple_insertions: COMPUTED: Boolean - true if stock has >1 unique transgenic construct (from stockgenes component data, or genotype regex fallback)
_column_notes.ALLELE_PAPER_RELEVANCE_SCORE: COMPUTED: 0 (Ref-)=no refs, 1 (Ref+)=has refs but none contain keywords in title/abstract, 2 (Ref++)=at least 1 ref has case-insensitive keyword hit in title/abstract (via boolean column or '<kw> references count' column)
_column_notes.comment1: COMPUTED: Merged from BDSC stockcomps_map_comments.csv for BDSC stocks
_column_notes._gene_chromosome_arm_NOTE: NOT AVAILABLE: Would require additional gene mapping data - filter not included

filterDescriptions.Bloomington: Stocks from the Bloomington Drosophila Stock Center (BDSC).
filterDescriptions.Ref++: Allele has at least one publication in the relevant topic (case-insensitive keyword match in title/abstract).
filterDescriptions.Ref+: Allele has at least one publication, but none in the relevant topic.
filterDescriptions.UAS: UAS (Upstream Activating Sequence) driver / GAL4-responsive construct.
filterDescriptions.AlleleOrInsertion: Classical allele or insertion line (not UAS).
filterDescriptions.No Balancers: No balancer chromosomes detected in genotypes with '/' (construct contents masked during parsing).
filterDescriptions.Has Balancers: Balancer chromosomes detected in genotypes with '/' (construct contents masked during parsing).
filterDescriptions.attP40: Single-construct stock with insertion at the attP40 site.
filterDescriptions.attP2: Single-construct stock with insertion at the attP2 site.
filterDescriptions.other_insertion: Stock has more than one unique transgenic construct (from BDSC component data).
filterDescriptions.no_other_insertion: Stock has only one unique transgenic construct (single insertion).
filterDescriptions.Split_AD: Split-Gal4: genotype includes the .AD (activation domain) component.
filterDescriptions.Split_DBD: Split-Gal4: genotype includes the .DBD (DNA-binding domain) component.
